name: Popsicle
description: Ice pops on their sticks, tilted in a summer cooler — flavors trade and lean with every redraw before they melt.

code.style: --flavor: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* pop and stick share one emitted tilt about the same center so they stay glued */ --pt: @r(-12deg, 12deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; top: 10%; width: 40%; height: 56%; border-radius: 99px 99px 26% 26%; background: var(--flavor); box-shadow: inset calc(-70px / @Y) 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); transform: rotate(@var(--pt)); transform-origin: 50% 71%; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 46%; top: 66%; width: 8%; height: 22%; border-radius: 99px; background: rgba(201, 160, 106, 0.95); transform: rotate(@var(--pt)); transform-origin: 50% -86%; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
